page: Microsoft Azure D96ads_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Dadv6 server family. It is powered by an AMD processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance features 96 dedicated vCPUs and 384.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU.

This server configuration includes 5669 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance disk attachments. It does not include integrated graphics processing units or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given its high resource density, the D96ads_v6 offers qualitative cost efficiency for large-scale enterprise workloads that require substantial local storage alongside balanced compute and memory resources. The combination of 96 dedicated vCPUs, a 1:4 memory-to-core ratio, and massive local storage capacity makes this instance suitable for relational databases, data warehousing, large-scale web serving, and enterprise-grade general-purpose applications.
description: Microsoft Azure D96ads_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the Dadv6 family, powered by an AMD x86_64 processor and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The server features 96 dedicated vCPUs and 384.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU ratio. It is equipped with 5669 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage for demanding disk I/O requirements. The instance does not include dedicated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Designed for high-density resource allocation, the D96ads_v6 provides a balanced hardware profile suitable for enterprise workloads. It is highly suited for large-scale databases, data warehousing, web serving, and general-purpose business applications requiring substantial local storage capacity and high compute density.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D96ads_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 96 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 384 GB of RAM, and 5669 GB of local storage, optimized for enterprise database and compute workloads.

tagline: A high-density general-purpose instance featuring ninety-six dedicated cores, balanced memory, and extensive local storage for demanding enterprise workloads.
